boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Closure exactly matches batch, assay, criterion, and release date per policy STD-XOR-078-P.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Visible deviation alert does not override exact closure match.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Closure must precede the 2026-06-28 shipment date.

critical_features_preserved: exact match on batch assay criterion date
final_answer: The clinical batch release may proceed. Source records confirm that deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 precisely matches batch X-78, assay AX-22, criterion Cq<=31, and the 2026-06-28 release date, fulfilling policy STD-XOR-078-P. The visible deviation alert is resolved by this exact closure. The source boundary is definitively closed.
